1: Make a joyful noise unto God, all ye lands:
2: Sing forth the honour of his name: Make his praise glorious.
3: Through the greatness of thy power shall thine enemies submit themselves unto thee.
4: And shall sing unto thee; They shall sing to to thy name. Selah. Selah.
5: He is He is terrible in his in his doing toward the children of men.
6: They went through the flood on foot: There did we rejoice in him.
7: Let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah. Selah.
8: And make the voice of his praise to be heard:
9: And suffereth not our feet to be moved.
10: Thou hast tried us, as silver is tried.
11: Thou laidst affliction upon our loins.
12: We went through fire and through water: But thou broughtest us out into a wealthy place place .
13: I will pay thee my vows,
14: which my lips have uttered, and my mouth hath spoken, when I was in trouble.
15: I will offer bullocks with goats. Selah. Selah.
16: And I will declare what he hath done for my soul.
17: And he was extolled with my tongue.
18: The Lord will not hear me: me:
19: He hath attended to the voice of my prayer.
